# Pull Request / Pull Request

## Summary / 摘要

Describe the change in one or two sentences.

请用一两句话描述本次改动。

## Learning or User Impact / 学习或用户影响

What becomes easier to learn, run, test, or extend?

什么内容变得更容易学习、运行、测试或扩展？

## Checklist / 检查清单

- [ ] I kept the change focused. / 我保持了改动聚焦。
- [ ] I updated tests for behavior changes. / 如果行为变化，我已更新测试。
- [ ] I updated public docs in English and Chinese when needed. / 如有需要，我已用中英双语更新公开文档。
- [ ] I ran `python -m unittest discover -s tests`. / 我已运行 `python -m unittest discover -s tests`。
- [ ] I did not commit secrets, API keys, private prompts, or production logs. / 我没有提交密钥、API key、私有提示词或生产日志。

## Notes / 备注

Add screenshots, command output, or follow-up ideas if useful.

如有帮助，请添加截图、命令输出或后续想法。
